item.title: Mikhaylovskaya, Vinogradovsky District, Arkhangelsk Oblast
item.description: Mikhaylovskaya (Russian: Михайловская) is a rural locality (a village) in Vinogradovsky District, Arkhangelsk Oblast, Russia. The population was 25 as of 2010.[2]

item.title: RAB11FIP1
item.description: Rab11 family-interacting protein 1 (Rab11-FIP1) also known as Rab-coupling protein is a protein that in humans is encoded by the RAB11FIP1 gene.[5][6][7]

item.title: Miguel de Almazán
item.description: Miguel de Almazán was a Marrano of Saragossa, and private secretary to King Ferdinand of Aragon.[1] He was burned at the stake on the accusation of being an adherent of Judaism. One month later, March 18, 1486, Manuel de Almaçan of Saragossa suffered the same fate.

item.title: Oona Brown
item.description: Oona Brown (born September 10, 2004) is an American ice dancer. Competing with her brother, Gage Brown, she is a 2026 Four Continents bronze medalist and two-time Denis Ten Memorial Challenge silver medalist (2024, 2025).

item.title: McAnulty
item.description: McAnulty is a surname. It is a variant of McNulty.[1][2]
